args.query:
SELECT
CASE WHEN substr(trim("Order"."OwnerId"),1,1)='#' THEN substr(trim("Order"."OwnerId"),2) ELSE trim("Order"."OwnerId") END as AgentId,
SUM(COALESCE(OrderItem.Quantity,0)*COALESCE(OrderItem.UnitPrice,0.0)) as total_sales
FROM "Order"
JOIN OrderItem ON "Order"."Id" = OrderItem.OrderId
WHERE date("Order"."EffectiveDate") BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

LIMIT 1;
